hero.title: How can we help you?
hero.subtitle: Our team is here to assist. Reach out and we'll help.

identity.label: Account Email
identity.verifiedTitle: Your verified account email will be used for support
identity.unverifiedTitle: Verify your account email before contacting support
identity.unverifiedDescription: Verification codes are sent only to your current account email. If this address is wrong, update it in your profile first.
identity.missingTitle: Add an email to your account before contacting support
identity.missingDescription: Support requests must come from a verified account email.

verify.profileHint: We only send codes to the email saved on your account.
verify.addEmailFirst: Add an email in your profile before requesting a verification code.
verify.sendError: Failed to send code. Try again.
verify.cooldown: You can request another code in {{seconds}}s.

errors.unauthenticated: Please log in to send a message.
errors.emailMissing: Add and verify an email in your profile before sending a message.
errors.emailNotVerified: Your email must be verified to send a message.
errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.

quick.title: Need urgent help?
quick.textAfter: for quick actions like cancellation or return requests.

items.q: How do I track my order?
items.a: After shipping, you'll receive a tracking link via email and SMS. You can also view it on your Orders page.

items.q: What is your return & refund policy?
items.a: Returns accepted within 7 days if unused and in original packaging. Refunds process in 3-5 business days.
Standard delivery in the UAE takes 2-4 business days. Express options may be available in select areas.

items.q: Can I change or cancel my order?
items.a: You can modify or cancel within 1 hour of placing the order. After that, it enters processing.

items.q: What payment methods do you accept?
items.a: Visa, Mastercard, Apple Pay, Cash on Delivery, and bank transfers.
